title: Inception
theory: The Totem Trap: The top is irrelevant. Cobb’s real totem is his wedding ring. In the final scene, he is ringless—meaning he has accepted his world, real or not.

title: Interstellar
theory: The 5th Dimension: The tesseract is built by 'future humans,' but those humans are actually the consciousness of TARS, evolved over billions of years.

title: The Matrix
theory: Double Simulation: Zion is simply 'Simulation Level 2.' It's designed to give the 1% of humans who reject the Matrix a false sense of rebellion.

title: Shutter Island
theory: The Audience is the Patient: The camera work is designed to trigger the same paranoia in the viewer as in Andrew Laeddis. You aren't watching a movie; you're being treated.

title: Parasite
theory: The Ghost in the House: The basement is a metaphor for the 'id' of the house itself. The house 'consumes' families to stay alive.
